name: Health Net, Inc.
description: Health Net, Inc. is a health care insurance provider that delivers managed health care services through health plans and government-sponsored managed care plans. The company operates primarily in California and Oregon, offering health insurance coverage to individuals, families, businesses, and Medicare and Medicaid beneficiaries. Health Net also provides behavioral health, substance abuse, and employee assistance programs, as well as managed health care products related to prescription drugs. In 2016, Health Net was acquired by Centene Corporation, continuing its operations as a major subsidiary focused on providing accessible and affordable health care solutions.
